mistral-large-latest.name: Mistral Large 3
mistral-large-latest.description: Open-weight flagship — multimodal reasoning with 262K context, Apache 2.0 licensed

mistral-medium-latest.name: Mistral Medium 3.1
mistral-medium-latest.description: Frontier-class multimodal model — strong coding and STEM at a fraction of Large's cost

mistral-small-latest.name: Mistral Small 4
mistral-small-latest.description: Unified model (Mar 2026) — reasoning, vision, and coding in one endpoint at Apache 2.0, very fast MoE

magistral-medium-latest.name: Magistral Medium
magistral-medium-latest.description: Mistral's flagship reasoning model — extended chain-of-thought for complex problem solving

codestral-latest.name: Codestral
codestral-latest.description: State-of-the-art code model — optimized for completion, fill-in-the-middle, and refactoring

devstral-latest.name: Devstral 2
devstral-latest.description: Open-weight coding agent (Dec 2025) — SOTA SWE-bench at 72.2%, built for autonomous software tasks
